_info.description: AstrBot Plugins Monorepo - Unified Configuration Schema
_info.note: Each sub-plugin has its own namespace for configuration. Enable/disable plugins using the 'enabled_plugins' field.

enabled_plugins.hint: Select which sub-plugins to enable. Available: langfuse, discord-forwarder, video-vision

secret_key.hint: Get your Secret Key from https://cloud.langfuse.com Project Settings > API Keys

public_key.hint: Get your Public Key from https://cloud.langfuse.com Project Settings > API Keys

session_timeout.hint: Session timeout in seconds. Default is 1 hour (3600 seconds)

environment.hint: Environment name for traces (e.g., production, development)

enabled.description: Enable or disable the message forwarder

forward_rules.hint: Configure multiple forwarding rules for different Discord bot instances. Click 'Add' to create a new rule.

default_rule.name: Forwarding Rule
default_rule.hint: Configure a Discord message forwarding rule

platform_id.hint: The Discord platform ID in AstrBot (e.g., 'discord', 'discord-b')

source_channel_id.hint: The Discord channel ID to forward messages FROM

destination_channel_id.hint: The Discord channel ID to forward messages TO

forward_text.hint: Include text content from forwarded messages

forward_files.hint: Include file attachments (MP4, PDF, etc.) from forwarded messages

include_sender_info.hint: Add sender name and ID to forwarded messages

ignore_bot_messages.hint: Skip forwarding messages sent by Discord bots

enabled.hint: Toggle this specific forwarding rule on/off

enabled.description: Enable or disable the video vision plugin

max_frames.description: Maximum number of frames to extract from each video (used when frame_interval=0)

frame_format.description: Output format for extracted frames (jpg, png, etc.)

skip_first_seconds.description: Skip the first N seconds of the video (useful to skip intros)

skip_last_seconds.description: Skip the last N seconds of the video (useful to skip outros)

frame_interval.description: Extract one frame every N seconds (0 = use max_frames instead, evenly distributed)

video_extensions.description: List of video file extensions to process

platform_ids.description: List of platform IDs to process (empty = all platforms)

channel_ids.description: List of Discord channel IDs to process (empty = all channels)

analysis_prompt.description: Prompt sent to the LLM for video analysis
analysis_prompt.default: Please analyze the content of this video based on the extracted frames. Describe what you see, including any actions, objects, people, or text visible in the frames.
